mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_key (provider_id, user_id, encrypted_key, key_hint, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{providerId}, #{userId}, #{encryptedKey}, #{keyHint}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_key SET encrypted_key = #{encryptedKey}, key_hint = #{keyHint}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT encrypted_key FROM provider_key WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND enabled = TRUE ORDER BY user_id IS NULL DESC, id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT encrypted_key FROM provider_key WHERE provider_id = #{providerId} AND enabled = TRUE AND (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IS NULL) ORDER BY CASE WHEN user_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, id ASC LIMIT 1
